strengths: Successfully completed needle loading and suture placement phases
Executed three extracorporeal throws with proper technique
Maintained consistent instrument control throughout the tying sequence
weaknesses: Failed to complete the final suture cutting phase
Did not perform final slit closure assessment
Task completion time exceeded optimal range at 340 seconds

drills.name: Complete sequence rehearsal
drills.description: Practice the full task from needle loading through final suture cutting and slit inspection without interruption.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the final suture cutting phase

drills.name: Slit-closure check drill
drills.description: After tying knots, practice tightening just enough to close the slit without avulsion, then visually inspect the closure quality.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not perform final slit closure assessment

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the complete task slowly with minimal wasted regrasping to improve efficiency and reduce completion time.
drills.targets_weakness: Task completion time exceeded optimal range

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on completing the entire task sequence consistently before pursuing speed improvements. Your knot tying technique is solid, but task completion discipline needs attention.
